finding: Finer scale is a REAL but PARTIAL lever: per-tensor -> group128 = +2.36 nats one-shot, row (per-output-channel, FOLDABLE) = +1.84. col does not help. BUT even the best is PPL ~11k (unusable one-shot) >> adapted all-I2_S PPL 114, so training remains the bigger lever. recon rel-L1 is ~0.45 across ALL granularities -> the dominant loss is the ternary codebook (deletes ~45% of weight magnitude), not the scale -> RT-124B (MSE scale + threshold) targets the codebook/threshold next.
